Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions Against Pltf'S For Failing To Comply With Order To Attend Their Depositions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT MISSION HOTEL and TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Plaintiffs For Failing To Comply With Order To Attend their Depositions is GRANTED. Complaint of Micah Kemp and Charles Mulieri is dismissed with prejudice. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Mtn For Order Compelling Pltfs To Appear For Depo
Off Calendar Aug-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on Thursday, August 28, 2014. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS MISSION HOTEL, LLC and TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC.'S Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs To Appear For Deposition is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs shall appear for deposition on September 5, 2014 or on another mutually agreeable date within 7 days of September 5, 2014. Prevailing party to prepare a form order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Lillian K. Sing; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)
